title: 10 fixes — IME composition, stuck spinners, broken images, lazy load
notes: FIX: 4 stuck-spinner spots — FollowersList modal, post search, Anonymous Connect matchmaking, all had .then() with no .catch() (rejection would leave 'Loading...' forever).

FIX: 9 Enter handlers across chat / comments / search now respect IME composition. Mandarin/Japanese/Korean users typing in their IME will no longer accidentally send a half-composed message when pressing Enter to confirm a candidate.
FIX: ~10 image sites in feed / notifications / likers / experts strip / composer now fall back to user initials when the URL 404s. New ImgWithFallback wrapper component.
PERF: Feed post images now load=lazy — faster first paint and less mobile data on long sessions.

FIX: Emoji-prefix names like '🤦‍♀️ Maria' now render correctly in initials avatars. New safeInitials utility uses Array.from for surrogate-pair-safe slicing. Applied to ~15 sites across HomeScreen, App, SearchScreen, IncomingCallModal.
POLISH: TopBarAvatar + Moments header avatar both got onError fallback to initials.
